documentation.text:
@title FileVerification
 @dev Smart contract for storing and verifying file hashes on Polygon blockchain

typeDescriptions.typeString: mapping(string memory => struct FileVerification.VerificationDetails storage ref)
mapping(string memory => struct FileVerification.VerificationDetails storage ref)
function (string storage ref[] storage pointer,string storage ref)

documentation.text:
@dev Verify a file by storing its hash on blockchain
 @param fileHash SHA-256 hash of the file

typeDescriptions.typeString: mapping(string memory => struct FileVerification.VerificationDetails storage ref)
mapping(string memory => struct FileVerification.VerificationDetails storage ref)

documentation.text:
@dev Get total number of verified files
 @return uint256 Count of verified files
